layout.title: Discover the picturesque Agiasos
layout.description: The most unique destination in Lesbos

hero.topper: The most unique destination in Lesbos
hero.title: Discover the picturesque Agiasos

pill1.heading: Discover
pill1.text: Discover Agiasos the artistic and religious centre of Lesvos, as well as the projects taken by Visit Agiasos AMKE to promote its unique heritage

pill2.heading: Explore
pill2.text: Explore the hidden treasures of Agiasos and immerse yourself in its unique charm with our autonomous museums, guided tours and year round events

pill3.heading: Life in Agiasos
pill3.text: Live in Agiasos and experience the unique culture and traditions of our village first hand

pill4.heading: Volunteer
pill4.text: Volunteer in Agiasos and help us promote our village and its unique culture
